name: California Polytechnic State University, San Luis Obispo
meets_full_need_notes: Cal Poly SLO does not guarantee to meet full demonstrated need. Aid is awarded based on available funds and priority filing. Many students receive partial need coverage.
no_loan_notes: Loans are a standard component of most Cal Poly financial aid packages, including subsidized/unsubsidized federal loans. No institutional no-loan policy.

merit_thresholds.notes: Cal Poly SLO offers Cal Poly Scholars, departmental scholarships, and CSU system scholarships. Merit scholarships often require separate applications. Cal Grant available for CA residents meeting GPA/need thresholds.

ed_aid_implications: Cal Poly SLO does not offer ED or EA. Admission is regular decision only.
appeal_policy: Students may submit a Special Circumstance appeal for unusual financial situations. Appeals reviewed by financial aid office with supporting documentation.
